leadText: The Amaze Mulch (Japanese: とんでもこやし Outrageous Fertilizer) is a type of item introduced in Generation VI. It is a type of Mulch used to increase the yield of Berry plants, promote Berry mutations, and dry out the soil of Berry plants more quickly.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon X and Y [ edit | edit source ] When applied to a Berry patch, the soil dries more quickly, the final harvest increases by 2 Berries, and Berry mutations are more likely (the combined effects of the Rich Mulch , Surprise Mulch , and Boost Mulch ). Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire onward [ edit | edit source ] The Amaze Mulch serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y Mulch to be used in a Berry field. An amazing Mulch with the effects of Rich, Surprise, and Boost Mulch. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A fertilizer for growing Berries. However, it appears to be unsuitable for the soil in the Hoenn region and has no effect.
